scripts.publish:all: pnpm build && pnpm publish:free && pnpm publish:paid
scripts.publish:paid: pnpm --filter @micrographics/react publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/vue publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/svelte publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @micrographics/vanilla publish --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:gh-free: pnpm --filter @micrographics/core publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com && pnpm --filter @micrographics/tailwind publish --no-git-checks --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
